'''鈭歯g-k-z-y''' ('''kangakzeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:forebear|forebear]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-z-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:forebear|forebear]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-k-z-y
|-
! Lemma
| kangakzeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingakzeyoko|thingakzeyoko]] || [[word:jingakzeyoko|jingakzeyoko]] || [[word:shingakzeyoko|shingakzeyoko]] || [[word:kingakzeyoko|kingakzeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-
